meta.title: Building TERRIBLE Rockets Imagined By AI
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/EA to take the rocket science out of staying informed on what's going on up in space and down on Earth. Subscribe through my link for 50% off the Ground News unlimited access Vantage Plan this month.

Get your tickets to the Astro Awards now before they're gone! http://astroawards.live

I used Meta and Grok to help come up with rocket ideas to build in Kerbal Space Program! The results are about exactly what you'd expect.

00:00 - Intro
00:43 - Astro Awards 
01:50 - Meta 1 Rocket
09:29 - Meta 2 Rocket
19:38 - Ground News Ad
21:24 - Meta 3 Rocket
33:36 - Grok Rocket Sled
39:16 - Grok Rocket Plane
45:50 - Results

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original, find it anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) under Everyday Astronaut
